summary: Maeda has explicitly called a market bottom, arguing that Bitcoin is poised for higher prices after the recent washout.
narrative: In his most recent video, he refutes 4-year cycle theories and identifies the current zone as a bottoming formation, specifically citing STRC as a marginal buying force that could propel BTC upward. This marks a decisive pivot from his previously successful bearish ETH short positions to a constructive outlook on the market.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
